query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS deferral_work_orders (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  work_order_number VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  data_center VARCHAR(255),
  sched_start_date VARCHAR(255),
  sched_end_date VARCHAR(255),
  assigned_to_name VARCHAR(255),
  supervisor VARCHAR(255),
  status VARCHAR(255),
  type VARCHAR(255),
  deferral_category VARCHAR(255),
  priority VARCHAR(255),
  equipment_description TEXT,
  trade VARCHAR(255),
  uploaded_by INT DEFAULT 0,
  uploaded_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
